zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall於1317年出生在英國爾諾波利時，他的父親Sir John de Leigh Venables II19歲，母親Maud Arderne20歲。他和Elizabeth Sandbach至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1399年在英國英格蘭爾諾波利享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall于1317年出生在英国爾諾波利时，他的父亲Sir John de Leigh Venables II19岁，母亲Maud Arderne20岁。他和Elizabeth Sandbach至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1399年在英国英格兰爾諾波利享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall was born in 1317, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John de Leigh Venables II, was 19 and his mother, Maud Arderne, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Sandbach. He died about 1399, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall est né en 1317, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Leigh Venables II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Maud Arderne, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Sandbach. Il est décédé environ 1399, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall 1317 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Leigh Venables II 19 und seine Mutter Maud Arderne 20. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Sandbach mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1399 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall è nato il nel 1317 nel Norbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Leigh Venables II, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Maud Arderne, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Sandbach. Morì circa 1399, nel Norbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John III Legh of Booths Hallが1317年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John de Leigh Venables IIは19歳，母Maud Arderneは20歳であった。彼はElizabeth Sandbachとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1399年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall(이)가 1317년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Leigh Venables II(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Arderne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Sandbach(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall nasceu em 1317, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Leigh Venables II, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Maud Arderne, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Sandbach. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1399, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall родился в 1317 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Leigh Venables II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Arderne, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Sandbach. Он умер около 1399 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall nació en 1317, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Leigh Venables II, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Maud Arderne, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Sandbach. Murió aproximadamente 1399, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
